text_block_list.text: It's the day after Mihono Bourbon's debut race...

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for giving me some of your time today,
Mihono Bourbon.

A reporter for an Umamusume magazine has
come to interview her.

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
First, let me say that you had a stunning debut.
We were all left speechless.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text: May I ask you about your future plans?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My ultimate goal is to win the Classic Triple
Crown. In other words, I aim to win the Satsuki
Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so?! I was certain that you would be
aiming to tackle the sprints.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I intend to run in the Classics. The Triple
Crown has been my dream since I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So you're saying that through
continued training, you've found a way to
compete in medium- and long-distance races?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I can't say that I have the confidence yet. I'm still
best suited for sprints.

Mihono Bourbon returns the reporter's baffled
look with one of her own.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
No, um... I'm just a little surprised you would
choose the path you have if that's how you feel...

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It would be a real shame if you were to get
injured.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My goal is the Triple Crown. This is
non-negotiable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I will train every day to improve my stamina
for longer races.

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text: I-I see...

Not truly convinced, the reporter leaves. Several
days later...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Mihono Bourbon, the big-name rookie many had
pegged as the next top sprinter, has
unexpectedly set her sights on the Triple
Crown..."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Leaving fans who had high hopes for her
bewildered."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Analysis complete. This is "criticism," is it not?

That bit about fan bewilderment sounds a little
fishy. It's possible the reporter just made it up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But I received multiple remarks that I interpreted
as being similar while I was running off-campus
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Retrieving voice data.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"It's better to stick with what you're good at. You
should rethink this, for your own sake."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Forcing yourself to run like this is dangerous.
We're telling you this because we care."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It appears they may have read this article and
proceeded to wait for me to leave campus.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I assume that these people think that I'm being
reckless.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It does not necessarily bother me, but I did not
anticipate the extent of their displeasure.
choice_data_list:
I can't believe they'd go so far as to lie in wait
for you...

text_block_list.text:
This isn't the first time this has happened,
actually.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Mihono Bourbon's aiming for the Classic
Triple Crown? What a waste! Why doesn't she
stick to sprinting?!

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure it's okay to put Mihono Bourbon
through such brutal training?

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...You belong in short-distance races, Bourbon.

Nobody was being malicious, but none of them
had faith in her decision.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Lowered eyebrows. Tightened lips. I have
identified "sadness" in your expression, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Why are you experiencing "sadness"?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Can further effort on my part resolve this
"frustration"?

I'm unsure how to explain myself to the confused
Mihono Bourbon.

She hasn't done anything wrong—people just
don't believe in her because we don't have the
results to back up her decision.
In that case...
choice_data_list: We'll have to prove ourselves in the next race.

text_block_list.text:
If we can get results that'll convince people she's
got what it takes to become a Triple Crown
champion...

Then the way everyone sees her might just
change.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But our next race is the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes,
a mile race of 1,600 meters.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That kind of distance still doesn't measure up to
the races for the Classic Triple Crown. Will
winning this be enough?
choice_data_list:
You'll just have to show everyone how good you
are.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: How good I am?

We'll show them that she can maintain her
impressive speed all the way until the end, even
at longer distances.

When I tell her that we can show them that she
has that kind of strength and grit at the Asahi Hai
Futurity Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. My analysis shows that you desire a
style of running that will quell everyone's doubts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. I will change the public's
perception at the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.

Our days of training together for the Asahi Hai
Futurity Stakes begin now!
